sources.title: AI in Tourism Market Size, Share & Trends Report 2024–2030
sources.key_claim: Global AI in tourism market valued at $2.95B in 2024, projected to reach $13.38B by 2030 at a CAGR of 28.7%

sources.title: State of Travel AI 2026: Market Map, Funding & Adoption
sources.key_claim: Total disclosed funding in travel AI exceeds $12 billion as of mid-2026; late-stage rounds dominate as investor sentiment shifts from experimentation to execution

sources.title: Expedia Group Explore 2026 in Las Vegas — AI Highlighted as Growth Engine for Travel Industry
sources.key_claim: Expedia unveils AI agents inside Partner Central to help partners identify problems, strengthen content, and speed onboarding; AI positioned as primary growth engine for all Expedia brands

sources.title: Navan Launches AI Travel Assistant (Navan Edge) for Unmanaged Business Travellers
sources.key_claim: Navan Edge is an AI-powered personalized travel assistant for business travellers without Navan through their employer; covers hotels initially, expanding to flights and restaurants

sources.title: Mindtrip Unveils New AI Travel and Events Features, Announces Investments from Amex Ventures, Capital One Ventures and United Airlines Ventures
sources.key_claim: Mindtrip secures institutional backing from three major financial and travel brands — Amex Ventures, Capital One Ventures, United Airlines Ventures — giving consumer AI trip planning platform direct rails into loyalty and booking ecosystems

sources.title: AI in Tourism Market Report 2024–2030 — Grand View Research
sources.key_claim: Global AI in tourism market estimated at $3,373.0M in 2024, projected to reach $13,868.8M by 2030 at a CAGR of 26.7% (corroborates MarketsandMarkets estimate)

sources.title: AI in Travel Market — CAGR of 36.2%, broader market definition
sources.key_claim: Broader AI-in-travel market (including all AI-touched travel commerce) growing at 36.2% CAGR — higher figure includes OTA algorithmic pricing, airline revenue management, and fraud detection AI

sources.title: Hot 25 Travel Startups for 2026
sources.key_claim: At least 60% of Hot 25 travel startups for 2026 are leaning heavily on AI; includes Mindtrip, FLYR, and sector-specific AI plays across visa tech, rentals, and business travel

sources.title: Top 17 Business Travel Startups to Watch in 2026
sources.key_claim: Navan ($9.2B valuation), FLYR ($300M+ raised), TravelPerk ($2.7B valuation) named as class of proven travel AI platforms scaling toward market dominance

sources.title: Artificial Intelligence (AI) in Travel Market Report 2026 — $222.4B market
sources.key_claim: Broadest market definition: AI in Travel valued at $222.4B in 2026 (includes all AI-enabled travel commerce — OTA platforms, airline systems, hotel tech, and loyalty AI); projected $710.57B by 2030 at 33.7% CAGR

sources.title: 8 Leading AI Agents That Are Redefining Travel in 2026
sources.key_claim: Profiles of leading AI travel agents in 2026: Booking.com AI, Expedia Romie, Google Gemini Travel, Navan, Mindtrip, and specialized itinerary builders — qualitative product landscape overview

sources.title: Navan Smart Ring Maker Files Confidentially for IPO — NASDAQ: NAVN October 2025
sources.key_claim: Navan went public on NASDAQ in October 2025; AI assistant for business travellers demonstrates platform expansion beyond managed corporate accounts

data_gaps: Precise 2020 AI in tourism market size not directly sourced — 5Y growth estimate derived from backward CAGR projection from 2024 baseline
3M growth (+38%) is estimated from quarterly extrapolation of annual CAGR; no direct quarterly market data was found for Q2 2026 AI in tourism
FLYR exact revenue or ARR figure not publicly disclosed — company is private; funding ($300M+) used as proxy for scale
Navan IPO share price, market cap at IPO, and current trading data not verified — $9.2B figure is pre-IPO valuation from last private round
Google Travel AI market share (63% of travel research) cited from general travel research statistics — specific Gemini travel query share figure is [unverified]
